title: Aurora, 33687 Palm Pals Milky Tea Boba, 5In, Soft Toy, Brown
features: From Aurora's highly popular Palm Pals Collection
Soft and extremely touchable soft toy made with high quality materials
Adorable Milky Tea Boba cuddly toy that is filled with beans
Children will love this cute and hugely collectable character
description: Product Description This cute Palm Pals Milky Tea Boba fits into the palm of your hand, full of beans making this a super soft and cuddly soft toy. Milky Tea Boba's body is a soft brown plush material with yellow colour straw on the top. This is a super cute playful soft toy. Palm Pals make great gifts for any occasion, whether it is for a birthday or as a general gift, everyone will fall in love with this adorable Milky Tea Boba. Milky Tea Boba is part of our Eco-Friendly initiative and comes with inner fibre fill and beans made from recycled plastic materials. Our hangtags are recyclable with our cloth labels being made from recycled materials. Aurora World is an industry leader with over 40 years of experience in designing and manufacturing innovative and high quality plush products. Safety Warning Suitable from Birth
